records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Her name is hphp, and an orphan...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her reason for enlisting is a bit peculiar. It's written as "world peace and justice."

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hi.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hi.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's so nice to meet you. I'm your roommate and also your senior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's so nice to meet you. I'm your roommate and also your senior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's so nice to meet you. I'm your roommate and also your senior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be so nervous. Even if this place is a military facility, they aren't that strict around here.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be so nervous. Even if this place is a military facility, they aren't that strict around here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm...! <color=#ffd34c>Mavka</color>... I just got enlisted today!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm...! <color=#ffd34c>Mavka</color>... I just got enlisted today!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm...! <color=#ffd34c>Mavka</color>... I just got enlisted today!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! Relax a little!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! Relax a little!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! Relax a little!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a cute name. And you're so pretty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's a cute name. And you're so pretty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's a cute name. And you're so pretty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm hphphp. We'll be living together from now on, so let's be friends.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm hphphp. We'll be living together from now on, so let's be friends.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm hphphp. We'll be living together from now on, so let's be friends.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although this place is a military institution for training Counters, it's just an ordinary school.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although this place is a military institution for training Counters, it's just an ordinary school.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although this place is a military institution for training Counters, it's just an ordinary school.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just think of it as having fun and enjoying life here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just think of it as having fun and enjoying life here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just think of it as having fun and enjoying life here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, could you stop talking so rigidly to me? It's kinda uncomfortable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, could you stop talking so rigidly to me? It's kinda uncomfortable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, could you stop talking so rigidly to me? It's kinda uncomfortable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: U-um... I'll try.
records.m_Talk_DEU: U-um... I'll try.
records.m_Talk_FRA: U-um... I'll try.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! You're funny. I think we're going to have fun together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! You're funny. I think we're going to have fun together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! You're funny. I think we're going to have fun together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But hey. The teacher said that I'm going to become a Counter soon, so we won't be able to spend a lot of time together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But hey. The teacher said that I'm going to become a Counter soon, so we won't be able to spend a lot of time together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But hey. The teacher said that I'm going to become a Counter soon, so we won't be able to spend a lot of time together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you'll also become a Counter one day, so say hi to me when we meet later, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you'll also become a Counter one day, so say hi to me when we meet later, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you'll also become a Counter one day, so say hi to me when we meet later, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay...! I'll never forget... you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay...! I'll never forget... you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay...! I'll never forget... you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The days I spent with hphphp were fun. It really felt like I was at school.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The days I spent with hphphp were fun. It really felt like I was at school.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The days I spent with hphphp were fun. It really felt like I was at school.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But... I wasn't able to see her once after she left.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But... I wasn't able to see her once after she left.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But... I wasn't able to see her once after she left.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>All of my friends I made after were just brief acquaintances, eventually having to say goodbye to all of them.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>All of my friends I made after were just brief acquaintances, eventually having to say goodbye to all of them.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>All of my friends I made after were just brief acquaintances, eventually having to say goodbye to all of them.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I just thought that they all became great Counters and members of the nation.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I just thought that they all became great Counters and members of the nation.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I just thought that they all became great Counters and members of the nation.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I thought that... I would be able to see them again after I graduate.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I thought that... I would be able to see them again after I graduate.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I thought that... I would be able to see them again after I graduate.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>That's odd. What did hphphp look like?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>That's odd. What did hphphp look like?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>That's odd. What did hphphp look like?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>What about the others that came after...? What were their names?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>What about the others that came after...? What were their names?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>What about the others that came after...? What were their names?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Was my name... even Mavka...?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Was my name... even Mavka...?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Was my name... even Mavka...?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The silver-haired little girl...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The silver-haired little girl...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The silver-haired little girl...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Was that... really me...?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Was that... really me...?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Was that... really me...?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka, tomorrow's a big day. Shouldn't you go to bed early?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka, tomorrow's a big day. Shouldn't you go to bed early?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka, tomorrow's a big day. Shouldn't you go to bed early?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... I'm so anxious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... I'm so anxious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... I'm so anxious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are my friends doing well across the various sections of the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are my friends doing well across the various sections of the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are my friends doing well across the various sections of the Northern Union?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... I'm excited to be able to meet them again soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe... I'm excited to be able to meet them again soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe... I'm excited to be able to meet them again soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You and your friends were wonderful kids.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You and your friends were wonderful kids.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You and your friends were wonderful kids.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm really looking forward to what you'll do, Mavka.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm really looking forward to what you'll do, Mavka.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm really looking forward to what you'll do, Mavka.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't think I received any specific training here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't think I received any specific training here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't think I received any specific training here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I did was get some shots, use some weird weapons... and study...
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I did was get some shots, use some weird weapons... and study...
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I did was get some shots, use some weird weapons... and study...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't imagine that you wouldn't teach a soldier how to even shoot a gun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't imagine that you wouldn't teach a soldier how to even shoot a gun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't imagine that you wouldn't teach a soldier how to even shoot a gun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know what I've felt living all these years so far?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know what I've felt living all these years so far?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know what I've felt living all these years so far?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's that a knife or a gun is never helpful for bringing peace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's that a knife or a gun is never helpful for bringing peace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's that a knife or a gun is never helpful for bringing peace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what does help it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then what does help it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what does help it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's... something we'll find out from here on out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's... something we'll find out from here on out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's... something we'll find out from here on out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have successfully extracted subject hphp's memory core.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have successfully extracted subject hphp's memory core.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have successfully extracted subject hphp's memory core.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will begin the transplant procedure to the <color=#ffd34c>Mavka</color> model.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will begin the transplant procedure to the <color=#ffd34c>Mavka</color> model.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will begin the transplant procedure to the <color=#ffd34c>Mavka</color> model.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All of hphp's memories will be fabricated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All of hphp's memories will be fabricated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All of hphp's memories will be fabricated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... The synchronization is excellent. I think we can begin her experiments right away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... The synchronization is excellent. I think we can begin her experiments right away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... The synchronization is excellent. I think we can begin her experiments right away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She will make an excellent Doll. She's just different from the others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She will make an excellent Doll. She's just different from the others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She will make an excellent Doll. She's just different from the others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka? Could you slowly open your eyes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka? Could you slowly open your eyes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka? Could you slowly open your eyes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka, can you hear me?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka, can you hear me?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka, can you hear me?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The C.O.s that reside in the Counterside sometimes emerge into the Normalside.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The C.O.s that reside in the Counterside sometimes emerge into the Normalside.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The C.O.s that reside in the Counterside sometimes emerge into the Normalside.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>If we don't do anything, they'll hurt a lot of people.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>If we don't do anything, they'll hurt a lot of people.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>If we don't do anything, they'll hurt a lot of people.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Your mission is to exterminate the C.O.s here and prevent any damages, Mavka.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Your mission is to exterminate the C.O.s here and prevent any damages, Mavka.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Your mission is to exterminate the C.O.s here and prevent any damages, Mavka.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>There are currently thirty-six C.O.s detected. You must eliminate all of them. Do you think you can do that?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>There are currently thirty-six C.O.s detected. You must eliminate all of them. Do you think you can do that?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>There are currently thirty-six C.O.s detected. You must eliminate all of them. Do you think you can do that?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I can do it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I can do it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I can do it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Good. Then, we're counting on you, Mavka.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Good. Then, we're counting on you, Mavka.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Good. Then, we're counting on you, Mavka.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka, report.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka, report.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka, report.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mission... complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mission... complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mission... complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Biosignals... not found.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Biosignals... not found.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Biosignals... not found.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Amazing. I didn't think she'd be this strong.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Amazing. I didn't think she'd be this strong.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Amazing. I didn't think she'd be this strong.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'm so proud of you, Mavka. You will soon be praised as a national hero.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I'm so proud of you, Mavka. You will soon be praised as a national hero.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'm so proud of you, Mavka. You will soon be praised as a national hero.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! I'll... do my best!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! I'll... do my best!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! I'll... do my best!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The surgery, and fighting the C.O.s in this strange world were all for my nation.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The surgery, and fighting the C.O.s in this strange world were all for my nation.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The surgery, and fighting the C.O.s in this strange world were all for my nation.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I thought I was fighting for justice and for the world.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I thought I was fighting for justice and for the world.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I thought I was fighting for justice and for the world.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I even felt proud looking at the annihilated C.O.s.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I even felt proud looking at the annihilated C.O.s.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I even felt proud looking at the annihilated C.O.s.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I was doing the righteous thing... Or so I believed.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I was doing the righteous thing... Or so I believed.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I was doing the righteous thing... Or so I believed.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>At least until that day...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>At least until that day...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>At least until that day...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay...! I'll never forget... you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay...! I'll never forget... you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay...! I'll never forget... you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The days I spent with hphphp were fun. It really felt like I was at school.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The days I spent with hphphp were fun. It really felt like I was at school.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The days I spent with hphphp were fun. It really felt like I was at school.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But... I wasn't able to see her once after she left.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But... I wasn't able to see her once after she left.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But... I wasn't able to see her once after she left.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>All of my friends I made after were just brief acquaintances, eventually having to say goodbye to all of them.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>All of my friends I made after were just brief acquaintances, eventually having to say goodbye to all of them.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I just thought that they all became great Counters and members of the nation.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I just thought that they all became great Counters and members of the nation.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I thought that... I would be able to see them again after I graduate.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I thought that... I would be able to see them again after I graduate.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I thought that... I would be able to see them again after I graduate.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>That's odd. What did hphphp look like?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>That's odd. What did hphphp look like?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>That's odd. What did hphphp look like?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>What about the others that came after...? What were their names?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>What about the others that came after...? What were their names?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>What about the others that came after...? What were their names?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Was my name... even Mavka...?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Was my name... even Mavka...?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Was my name... even Mavka...?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The silver-haired little girl...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The silver-haired little girl...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The silver-haired little girl...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Was that... really me...?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Was that... really me...?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Was that... really me...?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka, tomorrow's a big day. Shouldn't you go to bed early?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka, tomorrow's a big day. Shouldn't you go to bed early?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka, tomorrow's a big day. Shouldn't you go to bed early?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... I'm so anxious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... I'm so anxious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... I'm so anxious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are my friends doing well across the various sections of the Northern Union?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are my friends doing well across the various sections of the Northern Union?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are my friends doing well across the various sections of the Northern Union?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... I'm excited to be able to meet them again soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe... I'm excited to be able to meet them again soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe... I'm excited to be able to meet them again soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You and your friends were wonderful kids.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You and your friends were wonderful kids.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You and your friends were wonderful kids.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm really looking forward to what you'll do, Mavka.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm really looking forward to what you'll do, Mavka.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm really looking forward to what you'll do, Mavka.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't think I received any specific training here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't think I received any specific training here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't think I received any specific training here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All I did was get some shots, use some weird weapons... and study...
root.m_Talk_DEU: All I did was get some shots, use some weird weapons... and study...
root.m_Talk_FRA: All I did was get some shots, use some weird weapons... and study...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't imagine that you wouldn't teach a soldier how to even shoot a gun.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't imagine that you wouldn't teach a soldier how to even shoot a gun.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know what I've felt living all these years so far?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know what I've felt living all these years so far?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's that a knife or a gun is never helpful for bringing peace.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's that a knife or a gun is never helpful for bringing peace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then what does help it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then what does help it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then what does help it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's... something we'll find out from here on out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's... something we'll find out from here on out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's... something we'll find out from here on out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have successfully extracted subject hphp's memory core.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have successfully extracted subject hphp's memory core.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have successfully extracted subject hphp's memory core.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will begin the transplant procedure to the <color=#ffd34c>Mavka</color> model.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I will begin the transplant procedure to the <color=#ffd34c>Mavka</color> model.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All of hphp's memories will be fabricated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All of hphp's memories will be fabricated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All of hphp's memories will be fabricated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... The synchronization is excellent. I think we can begin her experiments right away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... The synchronization is excellent. I think we can begin her experiments right away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... The synchronization is excellent. I think we can begin her experiments right away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She will make an excellent Doll. She's just different from the others.

root.m_Talk_FRA: She will make an excellent Doll. She's just different from the others.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka? Could you slowly open your eyes?

root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka, can you hear me?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka, can you hear me?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The C.O.s that reside in the Counterside sometimes emerge into the Normalside.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The C.O.s that reside in the Counterside sometimes emerge into the Normalside.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The C.O.s that reside in the Counterside sometimes emerge into the Normalside.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>If we don't do anything, they'll hurt a lot of people.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>If we don't do anything, they'll hurt a lot of people.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>If we don't do anything, they'll hurt a lot of people.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Your mission is to exterminate the C.O.s here and prevent any damages, Mavka.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Your mission is to exterminate the C.O.s here and prevent any damages, Mavka.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>There are currently thirty-six C.O.s detected. You must eliminate all of them. Do you think you can do that?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>There are currently thirty-six C.O.s detected. You must eliminate all of them. Do you think you can do that?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>There are currently thirty-six C.O.s detected. You must eliminate all of them. Do you think you can do that?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I can do it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I can do it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I can do it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Good. Then, we're counting on you, Mavka.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Good. Then, we're counting on you, Mavka.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Good. Then, we're counting on you, Mavka.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Mavka, report.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mission... complete.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Biosignals... not found.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Amazing. I didn't think she'd be this strong.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Amazing. I didn't think she'd be this strong.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'm so proud of you, Mavka. You will soon be praised as a national hero.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'm so proud of you, Mavka. You will soon be praised as a national hero.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! I'll... do my best!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The surgery, and fighting the C.O.s in this strange world were all for my nation.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The surgery, and fighting the C.O.s in this strange world were all for my nation.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I thought I was fighting for justice and for the world.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I thought I was fighting for justice and for the world.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I even felt proud looking at the annihilated C.O.s.</color>
